ads.headline: "Where did you get that?" — every time you wear it
ads.primary_text:
You know the look: 'custom' hoodies with the same five Etsy fonts and a clipart heart. They photograph cheap because they are cheap.

Ours get redrawn stitch-by-stitch by a human digitiser before they ever touch fabric. No clipart. No template fonts. Just your idea, stitched like it came from a quiet-luxury atelier.

Elevated basics that don't look like anyone else's — because they literally aren't.
ads.visual_direction: Flat-lay macro of tonal cream-on-cream embroidery on heavyweight hoodie, natural light, no logo overlays
